installCommand: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix frontend install; else npm install; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then node frontend/scripts/sync_contract.mjs && npm --prefix frontend run build && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r frontend/dist/. dist/; else node scripts/sync_contract.mjs && npm run build; fi
